description_long: This bungalow features a complex, multi-hipped roof with dark gray shingles and a combination of light gray and warm brown exterior walls. The structure sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with a concrete base outlining the perimeter. The front facade is defined by a prominent gable and a recessed entryway, while the sides reveal a mix of small rectangular windows and a large, open garage or covered patio area. The rooflines intersect at various angles, creating a visually dynamic silhouette. Architectural renderings and interior images are displayed on the lawn, suggesting a modern, well-planned residential design. The overall appearance is clean, contemporary, and functional, suitable for a suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern bungalow with a multi-hipped dark gray roof, light gray and brown walls, and a mix of windows and open garage space. The design is clean and contemporary, set on a green lawn with a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gable, entryway, and architectural renderings on the lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large open garage or covered patio and a single window on the end wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with two smaller gables, several windows, and a clear view of the concrete base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage/patio opening and a solid end wall with minimal windows.
